basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant (Administration) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with 5 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Graduation with 5 years of relevant experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 26000 to Rs. 57000 + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://iitr.ac.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-10-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://iitr.ac.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-10-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Assistant (Administration) post at IIT Roorkee is 17 October 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant (Administration) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree along with 5 years of relevant experience to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant (Administration) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant (Administration) position announced by IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant (Administration) job?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 26000 to Rs. 57000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant (Administration) position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be found on the official website of IIT Roorkee, and a link will be provided in the Important Links section.
